Full-Stack & Mobile Applications Built With Care

BizMap

Full-Stack SaaS Compliance Platform

Feb 2026

A comprehensive SaaS platform designed to streamline business formation and compliance management. Built with modern technologies, BizMap helps first-time entrepreneurs navigate permits, inspections, and regulatory requirements with an intuitive dashboard.

Key Features

  • → Authentication & user onboarding
  • → Compliance task tracking
  • → Permits and inspections management
  • → Real-time progress tracking
  • → Responsive dashboard UI

Technologies

Next.js 14TypeScriptTailwind CSSSupabasePostgreSQL
Live Site ↗ GitHub ↗

NearGo

Location-Based iOS Event Discovery App

Aug 2025

An iOS application that solves the fragmented local event discovery problem by aggregating nearby events and displaying them on an interactive map. Designed with usability at its core, NearGo uses RESTful APIs to fetch real-time event data.

Key Features

  • → Location-based event discovery
  • → Interactive map interface
  • → Real-time event aggregation
  • → MVC architecture
  • → RESTful API integration

Technologies

SwiftUIKitURLSessionRESTful APIsiOS
GitHub Repository ↗

Skill-Bridge

Interdisciplinary Collaboration Platform

April 2025

A cross-functional collaboration platform built during the Gatorverse Hackathon. Led a team of 3 members to deliver a working prototype in 36 hours, implementing real-time chat and backend integration for seamless team communication.

Key Features

  • → Real-time chat functionality
  • → Cross-disciplinary collaboration
  • → Backend integration
  • → Team management
  • → Live communication

Technologies

PythonFlaskReal-time CommunicationBackend
GitHub Repository ↗
